diagrams.title: Computing Technology Stack Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Shows the layered hierarchy from hardware to applications in modern computing
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how modern computing technologies are organized and built upon each other

diagrams.title: Cloud vs Edge Computing Architecture
diagrams.description: Comparison showing data flow in cloud-centric vs edge-centric architectures
elements: IoT Devices/Sensors → Edge Gateway → Cloud Data Center vs IoT Devices → Local Edge Processing → Results
Latency: High in cloud, Low in edge
Data volume: Large in cloud transmission, Reduced at edge
diagrams.purpose: Visualize when to use cloud vs edge computing for optimal performance

diagrams.title: AI/ML/DL Relationship
diagrams.description: Venn diagram showing Artificial Intelligence as superset containing Machine Learning, which contains Deep Learning
elements: AI: Broad concept of machine intelligence
DL: Neural networks with multiple layers
diagrams.purpose: Understand the hierarchy and relationships between AI paradigms

diagrams.title: IoT Architecture Layers
diagrams.description: Four-layer architecture of IoT systems from perception to application
diagrams.purpose: Understand how IoT systems are structured end-to-end

visuals.title: The State Of The Art
visuals.description: Visual diagram for the state of the art
